HomeDestinationsAhaldhara
West Bengal

Ahaldhara

The Viewpoint Above the Clouds

First golden rays breaking over the horizon, painting the sky in coral and amber over endless ridges.

4.3
(76 reviews)
Kalimpong, West Bengal
mountainsnatureculturetrekking
20°C
Partly Cloudy
Explore

Overview

Introduction

Ahaldhara is a stunning viewpoint near Sittong, offering panoramic views of the Teesta River, the plains of Bengal, and the Eastern Himalayas.

History

Once a remote forest area, Ahaldhara has emerged as a popular viewpoint for its breathtaking scenery.

Altitude

1,600 m

Best Time

October to May

Temperature

Summer: 15-25°C | Winter: 2-10°C

Location

Kalimpong, West Bengal

Weather

Pleasant throughout the year

Summer

15-25°C

Winter

2-10°C

Monsoon

18-22°C

Gallery

Nearby Attractions

Viewpoint

Ahaldhara Viewpoint

The main attraction with 360-degree views.

Nature

Namthing Pokhri

A seasonal lake known for sighting salamanders.

KuboVista

Hidden Waterfall

A small waterfall off the main trail.

Why visit: Peaceful and photogenic

Viewpoints

panoramic

Ahaldhara Main Viewpoint

Best views of Teesta and Himalayas.

Local Cuisine

Must-Try Dishes

MomosThukpaAloo DumSel RotiChhurpi Soup

Restaurants

Viewpoint Restaurant

4.0

Local • ₹200-400

Simple meals with spectacular views.

Cafes

Sunset Cafe

4.1

Specialty: Tea

Best spot for evening tea.

Street Food

Momo Stall at Main Market

Freshly steamed and fried momos with spicy chutney

Thukpa Corner

Hot noodle soup with local vegetables and meat

Shopping

Local Stall

Handicrafts and snacks.

Local snacksHandicrafts

Culture & Festivals

Culture

Rich Himalayan culture with Buddhist monasteries and Nepali traditions.

LosarBuddha JayantiDashainTihar

Adventure Activities

Viewpoint Trek

Easy

Short trek to the main viewpoint.

1.5 hrs
₹400

Snacks, Tea
Taxi from Siliguri
N/A
₹1,000

How to Reach

train

Nearest railway station is New Jalpaiguri (NJP)

~3 hrs drive
₹150-500

flight

Nearest airport is Bagdogra (IXB)

~2.5 hrs drive
₹3,000-8,000

bus

Direct buses from Siliguri and Darjeeling

~3-4 hrs
₹200-400

car

Private taxis and shared jeeps available

~2.5 hrs
₹2,500-4,000

Nearby Railway

New Jalpaiguri Junction (NJP) - 72 km

Nearby Airport

Bagdogra Airport (IXB) - 78 km

Taxi Fare

Shared: ₹150-200, Private: ₹2,500-3,500

Bike Rental

₹500-800/day (Royal Enfield/Scooty)
